name: Aboio Agent Skills
description: Agent Skills to help developers using AI agents with Gleam and Postgres

skills.name: gleam
skills.description: Core Gleam language skill covering syntax fundamentals, type design, Parse Don't Validate, and JSON decoding.

skills.name: pg-gleam
skills.description: Postgres performance optimization and best practices for a Gleam stack.

skills.name: code-simplifier
skills.description: Expert Gleam code simplification specialist. Refines recently modified code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability.

skills.name: observability-master
skills.description: Senior observability engineer specializing in Gleam/Erlang/OTP logging. Finds unlogged error branches.

skills.name: tdd
skills.description: Test-Driven Development. Write failing test first, then implement. RED → GREEN → REFACTOR cycle.

skills.name: api-gleam
skills.description: REST/JSON API design patterns for Gleam+Wisp.

skills.name: frontend-testing
skills.description: Lustre frontend testing — model, update, and behavior. No styling tests unless explicitly requested.

skills.name: gleam-backend
skills.description: Gleam backend development skill for the Erlang target. Covers Wisp, Mist, OTP actors, Supervision trees, and SQL codegen integration.

skills.name: lustre
skills.description: Gleam frontend development skill targeting JavaScript. Covers Lustre 5.x, MVU Architecture, Advanced Forms, and SPA Routing.

plugins.name: gleam-lsp
plugins.description: Code Intelligence support for the Gleam language using the official `gleam lsp` server.
